title: The 1% Fee Quietly Stealing $320K From Your 401k
hook: There's a fee inside your retirement account most people never look at — and over 40 years, it quietly steals more than the cost of a house.
angle: Expense ratios in actively managed mutual funds vs. index funds represent a massive, invisible wealth drain most investors never notice or question.
audience: 401k and IRA holders who have never checked their fund expense ratios, especially anyone in actively managed funds.
